name: Coding Tools
description: Native coding tools (FILE, SHELL, WORKTREE) running directly in the agent. AST-validated commands, mtime-gated writes, sealed workspace roots, optional per-OS process sandboxing (sandbox-exec on macOS, bwrap on Linux).

CODING_TOOLS_WORKSPACE_ROOTS.label: Workspace roots
CODING_TOOLS_WORKSPACE_ROOTS.help: Comma-separated absolute paths the coding tools may read/write under. Defaults to the runtime's cwd.

CODING_TOOLS_DENY_COMMANDS.label: Forbidden command patterns
CODING_TOOLS_DENY_COMMANDS.help: Comma-separated regex patterns the SHELL action must refuse. Combined with the built-in denylist and AST analyzer.

CODING_TOOLS_SHELL_BG_BUDGET_MS.label: Foreground budget
CODING_TOOLS_SHELL_BG_BUDGET_MS.help: Shell invocations exceeding this auto-background and return a task_id.

CODING_TOOLS_OS_SANDBOX.label: OS-level sandbox
CODING_TOOLS_OS_SANDBOX.help: Wrap bash invocations in sandbox-exec (macOS) or bwrap (Linux) when available. AST analysis runs regardless.
